---
title: Full Recall
description: 'Representative retrieval page'
---

<Info>
  This mode—while slower—returns richer recall context.
</Info>

## Retrieval modes

- **`fast`** — Single-query retrieval.
- **`thinking`** — Multi-query with reranking.

This helps your assistant understand not just what is mentioned, but how things relate—like knowing which service owns a dependency.

<Tip>
  Start simple—then increase context depth as needed.
</Tip>
